response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data systems, meeting the 8+ year bar and language requirements. However, the resume shows no demonstrable experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure at scale, or statistical analysis — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Title history tops out at Staff/Senior, and there is limited evidence of multi-team platform leadership or cross-org influence at the scale expected for IC6 Growth/Experimentation.
strengths: 13+ years engineering experience spanning multiple required languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python-adjacent)
Exposure to high-throughput distributed systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency services)
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, open source platform ownership)
concerns: No explicit experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flag, or growth-platform experience mentioned
Limited evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team platform leadership or stakeholder influence at enterprise scale
No demonstrated data-science/statistical analysis or telemetry-platform building skills
